title: fragaria nipponica var. yakusimensis
intro: Fragaria nipponica var. yakusimensis, also known as Yakushima strawberry, is a rare and endangered species of strawberry native to Japan. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fragaria nipponica var. yakusimensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing potential anti-cancer properties. In traditional Japanese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in herbal infusions and topical applications.
